raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
STEP 2: Drink 1-2 glasses of water.
STEP 3: Seek medical attention immediately.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or Poison Control and provide the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or Poison Control and provide the product label/SDS.
